message:
fix: rename lint:fix to lint__fix for Windows CI compatibility

Windows disallows colons in filenames. The mise task file
`lint:fix` in the zenobius-pi-dcp extension artifact caused
`git checkout` to fail on windows-latest CI runners with
"error: invalid path". Renamed to `lint__fix` and updated
all 6 checksum/provenance references across catalog files.

Also includes compatibility scanner optimization and updated
conformance/perf reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
